reasoning: The control SC-7(3) focuses on limiting external network connections, which can be directly mapped to Kubernetes NetworkPolicies and service configurations. NetworkPolicies can enforce default deny rules for ingress and restrict access to specific IP ranges, effectively controlling external access. Additionally, restricting the use of LoadBalancer services and configuring Ingress resources to whitelist specific IP ranges further aligns with the control's intent to limit external network connections.
title: Boundary Protection - Boundary protection | access points limit the number of external network connect
